description: Large legal document. Fragment (right side only). Mentions: Rosh ha-Qehillot; gold for somebody's daughter; Abū Manṣūr (b. Yaʿaqov?); the wife of Abū l-Faḍl; Abū l-Maʿālī; a daughter and her husband; and a dignitary (Head of the Jews?) titled Mordekhay ha-Zeman in the last line.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
